name: omniaffiliate-ai-engine
description: OmniAffiliate AI Engine — Affiliate automation platform

scripts.db:migrate: npm run db:migrate:products && npm run db:migrate:content && npm run db:migrate:publish && npm run db:migrate:config
scripts.db:migrate:products: cd backend/src/modules/product-management && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:content: cd backend/src/modules/content-factory && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:publish: cd backend/src/modules/distribution-hub && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:config: cd backend/src/modules/config && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: npm run db:push:products && npm run db:push:content && npm run db:push:publish && npm run db:push:config
scripts.db:push:products: cd backend/src/modules/product-management && npx prisma db push --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push:content: cd backend/src/modules/content-factory && npx prisma db push --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push:publish: cd backend/src/modules/distribution-hub && npx prisma db push --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push:config: cd backend/src/modules/config && npx prisma db push --schema=./prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:generate: npm run db:generate:products && npm run db:generate:content && npm run db:generate:publish && npm run db:generate:config
